title: MEDICAL AND PHARMACY CLINIC - 211info
text: KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER MEDICAL AND PHARMACY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general medical care including but not limited to diagnosis and treatment of illnesses/injury, infant and child exams, immunization services, podiatry services, pap smears/breast health exams, on-site labs and x-rays, information about Special Diabetes Program for Indians (SPDI), pharmacy access, and possible off-site medical referrals 330 Chiloquin Boulevard Chiloquin, OR 97624 Eligibility: Native American individuals of federally recognized tribes Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm (541) 882-1487 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 882-1487 Other (541) 882-1487 ext 601 SPDI Aislyn Ukpik INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, Medicare, and provide insurance. Also offers sliding scale fees. DOCUMENTS: Tribal card or certification from a federally recognized tribe, birth certificate/photo identification such as state issued ID or a driver's license, social security card, insurance cards. Proof of income will be required for those without insurance. Klamath Tribal members or children of Klamath Tribal members residing in Kalmath County must provide a current utility bill or rental receipt with rental contract in order to show residency. AREA SERVED: Klamath County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Services: Diabetes Management Clinics * Native American Community General Medical Care * Native American Community Medication Information/Management * Native American Community Pharmacies * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER
